overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay footage showing a character exploring a primitive coastal settlement at sunset. The character walks past thatched huts and a seated villager, then traverses cliff edges overlooking a vast valley with a distant smoke plume, before cutting to a rocky canyon stream bed.

events.description: character approaches the hut entrance and a seated villager comes into view
character turns left to follow the cliff edge path away from the hut

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the settlement, approaching a seated villager near a primitive hut with an animal skull decoration

notable_agents.action: villager sitting by the hut entrance holding a cup, watching the character pass by

entered.detail: domed dwelling constructed from wooden branches and dried vegetation with animal skull decoration above doorway
tall wooden post with white painted markings and carvings
large circular stone building on the hillside in the background
gnarled bare tree branches silhouetted against the sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a primitive settlement at golden hour, approaching a thatched hut adorned with an animal skull. A seated villager rests near the entrance as the character passes by wooden totems and turns toward the cliff edge path.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliff edge overlook with panoramic valley views

events.description: settlement huts pass out of view as character reaches the open cliff edge overlooking the vast valley
character approaches and begins crossing the wooden rope bridge structure
hard cut transition to a new location with rocky stream bed

agents.ego_description: walking along the cliff edge path, taking in the panoramic views of the distant smoke plume and mountains, then crossing a wooden bridge with hanging totems

entered.detail: rickety wooden platform structure extending over the cliff edge with hanging ropes and totems
tall column of dark smoke rising from a distant mountain peak against the sunset
vast canyon landscape with layered rock formations and distant mesas

segments.scene_description: Leaving the settlement behind, the character walks along a dramatic cliff edge with expansive views of a vast valley. A distant smoke plume rises from a mountain peak as the sun sets. The character crosses a precarious wooden bridge adorned with hanging totems before the scene cuts.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon stream bed with red rock formations

events.description: abrupt scene change to a shallow water pool surrounded by red rocks and canyon walls

agents.ego_description: walking through a shallow stream in a rocky canyon, heading toward distinctive red rock formations

entered.detail: calm reflective water surrounded by dark wet rocks and boulders
large reddish rock formation with horizontal layered striations
tall rocky cliffs enclosing the path on both sides

segments.scene_description: After a hard cut, the character finds themselves in a narrow rocky canyon, walking through shallow water pools. The environment features distinctive red rock mesas and enclosing canyon walls under a dusky sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a primitive coastal settlement into a vast valley and finally down into a secluded rocky canyon. It begins at golden hour, moving past thatched huts adorned with animal skulls and seated villagers before turning toward a cliff edge path. As the character leaves the settlement, the view expands across a dramatic valley where a distant smoke plume rises from a mountain peak under a setting sun. The camera then follows the character across a precarious wooden bridge decorated with hanging totems before shifting abruptly into a narrow canyon. Finally, the environment transforms into a landscape of red rock mesas and enclosing walls as the character walks through shallow water pools under a dusky sky.
